headline: WELL Health Supports Ontario’s Commitment to a Provincewide Primary Care Medical Record System
summary: VANCOUVER, British Columbia & TORONTO, March 20, 2026--WELL Health Technologies Corp. (TSX: WELL) (the "Company" or "WELL"), a digital healthcare company focused on positively impacting health outcomes by leveraging technology to empower healthcare practitioners and their patients globally, today expressed its strong support for the Ontario government’s announcement of a new provincewide Primary Care Medical Record system, and confirmed its intent to actively participate in the forthcoming procu
